name: Streak Saver
subtitle: TikTok streak automation (iOS)
description: Open-source TikTok streak saver distributed for AltStore sideloading.

apps.name: Streak Saver
apps.subtitle: Keep your TikTok streaks alive
apps.localizedDescription: Automatically send TikTok messages to maintain streaks. Uses Shortcuts for daily runs on iOS.

privacy.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Streak Saver notifies you when streak runs finish or when you need to log in again.
